summary: Frontend testing of document preview feature completed. All features working correctly: document badge on compliance cards, preview modal with zoom/rotate/download controls, image preview, and modal close functionality.

accessibility_warnings.issue: Missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for screen readers (console warnings)

passed_tests: Document badge shows on compliance card with paperclip icon and count (📎 1)
Clicking document thumbnail opens preview modal
Zoom out button present and functional
Download button present in modal header
Document download API returns correct file (HTTP 200, image/png, 4884 bytes)
Modal closes properly with Escape key
Document filename displayed in modal header
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DocumentPreviewModal should add DialogTitle and aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document preview feature fully tested and working. Test user upload_test@example.com has property 'Upload Test Prop' with Gas Safety Certificate and one PNG document attached. All zoom/rotate/download controls functional.

document_badge_on_compliance_card.details: Paperclip icon with count badge (📎 1) shows on compliance cards with documents

document_preview_modal.details: Opens when clicking document thumbnail, shows filename in header

image_preview.details: PNG image displays correctly in modal with dark background

zoom_controls.details: Zoom in/out buttons work, percentage displayed (100% → 125%)

download_button.details: Download button present, API returns correct file

pdf_preview.details: No PDF document available in test data, but iframe implementation present in code

navigation_arrows.details: Only one document in test data, prev/next buttons only show when multiple documents exist
